ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 imgBB 上传器...

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 imgBB 上传器...

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The API key given to you by ImgBB.  This value is stored as an environment variable and is not written to plugin persistent data.  Once you paste your API key in, close the window and re-open settings to validate the value is set to 'hidden'
ast.target: ImgBB 提供给您的 API 密钥。此值作为环境变量存储，不会写入插件持久化数据。粘贴 API 密钥后，关闭窗口并重新打开设置以验证值是否已设置为“隐藏”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, uploads will be automatically deleted after specified set time (seconds).  Per ImgBB, minimum is 60 seconds.
ast.target: 如果启用，上传内容将在指定时间（秒）后自动删除。根据 ImgBB 规定，最短为 60 秒。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 上传内容的过期时间（以秒为单位）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, pasting image source URLs into a note will automatically attempt an upload to ImgBB
ast.target: 如果启用，将图片源 URL 粘贴到笔记中将自动尝试上传到 ImgBB。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 粘贴时捕获图片超链接？

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: API Key for imgBB has been encrypted and saved!
ast.target: imgBB 的 API 密钥已加密并保存！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: It looks like you haven't specified an API key.  This is required for upload
ast.target: 看起来您尚未指定 API 密钥。上传功能需要此密钥。
